articles.title: Olivia Rodrigo announces 'The Unraveled Tour' across US, Europe, UK
articles.description: Olivia Rodrigo has announced 'The Unraveled Tour,' a huge 65-date global tour across North America, Europe, and the UK. Kicking off in September, the tour is promoted by Live Nation and will feature various opening acts on select dates.

articles.title: JuliaHub raises $65mn, launches AI platform for industrial design
articles.description: Bengaluru-based JuliaHub secured $65 million in funding. The company also launched Dyad 3.0, its updated AI platform. Dyad brings agentic AI to hardware engineering. It designs, simulates, and optimizes complex industrial systems. This platform aims to significantly reduce development timelines. Engineers can now develop systems faster than ever before.

articles.title: ‘The Devil Wears Prada 2’ Rotten Tomatoes score surprises fans — Is the sequel better than the original? Here’s the early review
articles.description: The Devil Wears Prada 2 arrives in theaters Friday, bringing back Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt and Stanley Tucci to the fashion world that made the 2006 original a pop culture favorite. Early reviews and fan reactions suggest a polished, familiar sequel that leans on its star power, designer aesthetics and a storyline centered on print media struggling to stay relevant in the digital age.

articles.title: UK surgeon explains if microplastics increase colon cancer risk; shares control measures
articles.description: Microplastics inside the gut can create a number of health problems. However, we are yet to get proof that they increase colon cancer risk in humans.

articles.title: May 2026 School Holidays: Full list, summer vacations, heatwave alerts & state-wise closure dates in India
articles.description: India is experiencing an intense heatwave, forcing many states to declare early summer vacations. Temperatures are soaring, making daily commutes difficult and posing health risks. Schools in Delhi are set to close from May 11 to June 30, while Odisha has already begun its summer break from April 27.

articles.title: Mumbai Metro One commuters face delays, overcrowding as post-maintenance speed limits slow trains
articles.description: Mumbai Metro One commuters experienced delays and overcrowding on Thursday due to temporary speed restrictions. The operator implemented these curbs following essential rail grinding work, a collaborative effort with Bangalore Metro to enhance track quality and ride safety. These necessary measures, aimed at ensuring commuter safety, are expected to be in place for a limited duration.

articles.title: Dhan launches Gold Vault Enables Indians to buy Gold & Silver directly from Exchange
articles.description: Bangalore : Dhan, one of India’s fastest growing trading & investing platforms, announced the launch of ‘Gold Vault’ – a first-of-its-kind investment product that allows every Indian investor to buy physical Gold & Silver at live prices traded on stock exchanges. Gold Vault by Dhan operates entirely within SEBI’s capital markets regulatory framework, giving investors [...] The post Dhan launches Gold Vault Enables Indians to buy Gold & Silver directly from Exchange appeared first on FM Live .

articles.title: '69 million barrels Iran can’t sell': After 2 weeks of US naval blockade in Hormuz, what next?
articles.description: US Central Command reports 41 tankers carrying 69 million barrels of oil are blocked from offloading due to US enforcement measures, cutting off Iranian trade. President Trump has directed aides to prepare for an extended blockade, viewing it as a high-risk, effective strategy to pressure Tehran on its nuclear program.
